examples: If thawed semen is used, it has to be injected directly into the uterus through the ewe's belly wall.
Interviews revealed that the males with good semen quality ate significantly more fruits and vegetables.
A human study has found strong links between BPA levels and semen quality, and the findings are not looking good.
The energy that male fish expend on courtship comes at the expense of their semen.
Mr Pitchfork was asked to provide a sample, and it matched the semen from both victims.
